Bash(python -c " import sys, json r = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('status :', r['status']\) print\('partial_message:', r['partial_message']\) print\('ncv_reduction_pct:', r['ncv_reduction_pct']\) print\('total_improvement_score:', r['total_improvement_score']\) print\('cost_efficiency:', r['cost_efficiency']\) print\('ai_report_summary:', \(r['ai_report_summary'] or ''\)[:80], '...'\) print\('ai_insights count:', len\(r['ai_insights'] or []\)\) first_action = r['actions_taken'][0] print\('action[0].reason:', first_action['reason'][:80]\) print\('action[0].score :', first_action['score']\) print\('action[0].affected_domains:', first_action['affected_domains']\) " kill %1)
